case_title: JIAN VING LIN VS. GUI ZHONG QIU

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIN, JIAN VING
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $5.75 SERVED AUG-01-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT QIU, GUI ZHONG
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY LIN, JIAN VING AS TO DEFENDANT QIU, GUI ZHONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-30-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-15-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIN, JIAN VING AS TO DEFENDANT QIU, GUI ZHONG

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-18-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIN, JIAN VING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QIU, GUI ZHONG $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,570.75, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT OF $3,000.00 OF THE JUDGMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF THE DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN OCTOBER 30, 2015, REMOVE ALL HIS BELONGINGS FROM THE GARAGE LOCATED AT 2182 26TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94116. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT QIU, GUI ZHONG
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER---BANNIE CHOW. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
